name: callcontext::ReturnCall
title: callcontext::ReturnCall
description: Returns the call immediately, sending an answer to the caller. Note that many function calls require an answer per protocol even if the function has neither a return value nor an out parameter.
Immediately means in effect after the current handler has been processed or when the current test procedures reaches a wait instruction, but at the same point of (simulation) time.
You can optionally set the return value (if the function does not return void).
This call is equivalent to callcontext::SetTimeToAnswer(0).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
